ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date for the stock market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price for the day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid out */,
  "splits" REAL /* Stock splits */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "fast_10_day_ema" REAL /* 10-day Exponential Moving Average */,
  "slow_40_day_ema" REAL /* 40-day Exponential Moving Average */,
  "apo" REAL /* Absolute Price Oscillator */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades for the day */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position held in the stock */,
  "pnl" REAL /* Profit and loss for the position held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The symbol used to represent the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the company for the stock */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the portfolio stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio stock was last updated */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance score of the news to the stock market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set up the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "date_set" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who requested the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily report, analysis report) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
